description: Composition White shirt made of a cotton polyester blend fabric, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a pocket on the left chest Fit Classic Wash care Machine wash inside-out separately in warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Designed for the ambitious executive, this plain white formal shirt from the john miller collection is stitched to perfection. Pair it with crisp formal pants, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is of size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18”
